title: Dynimite stick
description: Adds a dynimite stick, throw and use as bomb or weopon
body:
*throw version of tnt*
dynimite stick have
3d model & sprite

explosion force - 2
throwed deal damage to the mobs and then explode

![main craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd06622db54e4a23f77945b66e5394aff99c3c3.png)

crafts in mod
sand and gunpowder - dynimite stick
tnt - 5 dynimite stick
5 dynimite stick - tnt

Where can you use it
To bore in nether
To defense
For fun
(the lighter version of dynimite sticks plus)
![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9e17520cbda36325555e9b7ffe7156e61eb52dc_0.webp)
~~~~
